candidates.why: Direct sales/top-line revenue label; preferable to Total Revenue because Total Revenue includes Other income in some years.
Revenue-related subtotal, but less preferred because it includes Other income in 2024 and 2023.
Not revenue; this is a cost line.

variables.notes: Use Revenue as primary top-line sales label; Total Revenue as fallback if reporting label changes.

candidates.why: Generic COGS label, but appears inconsistent with gross profit because it does not reflect capitalized own work.
Only one component of production cost and only shown for 2021; not full COGS.
Best net cost-of-sales line; it reconciles with Gross Profit after including work carried out for own account and capitalised.
Balance sheet inventory component, not income statement COGS expense.

variables.notes: Selected the net cost-of-sales line that matches the gross profit bridge.

candidates.why: Clear operating overhead component and valid SG&A candidate.
Headcount metric on balance sheet sheet, not an expense row.
Finance cost, not SG&A.

variables.notes: Candidate list appears to miss a key overhead labor line: 'Staff costs' is present in the A-column and is likely SG&A/operating overhead, but the label is duplicated in the preview, making exact selection ambiguous under the exact-label rule. Therefore I kept final_choice minimal using the valid candidate 'Other external costs' and added the separate R&D line so (XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD) works correctly when R&D is separately reported. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Research & Development Expense - Supplemental

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related amortization, but not the dedicated current-period R&D expense line.
Explicit dedicated R&D expense line; best match for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related amortization, but not the primary R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset gross value, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization/impairment, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset gross value, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Acc Amort/Imp Development Projects in Progress
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D expense line exists and is selected as primary XRD.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost bucket; usable fallback if specific interest lines are unavailable.
Too broad/other finance items; less preferred than direct interest labels.
Specific interest expense component; valid but narrower than general interest expense.
Direct interest expense label; best semantic match.
Most standard direct interest expense label; appropriate highest-priority fallback despite blank preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest supplemental line; valid but narrow and supplemental.

variables.notes: Priority list favors direct interest-expense labels first, then broader financial expenses as fallback.

candidates.why: Best available book equity line; no separate parent-equity line is shown.
Equivalent equity line and useful fallback if label changes.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not book equity.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners equity line or non-controlling interest line is present, so total/common equity is used for BE.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income line, not a balance sheet minority interest/equity line.

variables.notes: No balance sheet line for minority interest or non-controlling interests is present; use 0.
